---
bibliography: "propositional-logic.bib"
number-sections: true
crossref:
  chapters: true
---

{{< include /assets/macros/macros.qmd >}}

# Propositional Logic

{{< include introduction.qmd >}}

{{< include syntax.qmd >}}

:::{.content-hidden when-profile="lecture-6"}
{{< include semantics.qmd >}}
:::

:::{.content-hidden when-profile="lecture-6"}
:::{.content-hidden when-profile="lecture-7"}
{{< include completeness.qmd >}}
:::
:::

:::{.content-hidden when-profile="lecture-6"}
:::{.content-hidden when-profile="lecture-7"}
:::{.content-hidden when-profile="lecture-8"}
{{< include proofs.qmd >}}
:::
:::
:::

## References {.unnumbered}
